canonical_answer: A man with short brown hair wearing a blue sweatshirt sits in the driver's seat of a red convertible car. The vehicle features a cream-colored interior with the convertible top folded down behind the seats. Shelves filled with red and white boxes line the garage wall behind the vehicle. Text overlays displaying a website URL appear in the top right corner of the frame.

question: Describe what is happening in the scene.
canonical_answer: Inside a garage, a man wearing a blue long-sleeved sweatshirt occupies the driver's seat of a red convertible. The car's tan interior is exposed with the soft top lowered and stacked behind the seats. A wooden workbench and shelving units holding various boxes are visible in the background. Chrome trim surrounds the windshield frame of the vehicle.
